Motion To Compel Production Of Documents & Further Answers To Special Interrogatories & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Cross-Defendant Feldman Waldman & Kline's Motion To Compel Production of Documents and Further Answers To Special Interrogatories is moot in part and denied in part. The court does not find that the election to produce documents as they are maintained in the regular course of business pursuant to C.C.P. Section 2031.280(a) is improper. The court will not determine the adequacy of the supplemental responses to the special interrogatories on this motion. However, the court would not find the election to provide documents in lieu of a further response to be improper. In electing that option, Defendant Storek would be required to describe the responsive documents or category of documents in sufficient detail to permit the propounding party to locate and identify, as readily as the responding party can, the documents from which the answer may be ascertained. C.C.P. Section 2030.230. Cross-Defendant Feldman Waldman & Kline's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
